description: Python SDK for EuroMail — GDPR-compliant transactional email API (EU data residency, Finland). Send emails, manage domains, templates, webhooks, contact lists, and AI agent mailboxes.
rules: send_email() returns a dataclass with .id and .status where status is 'queued' (202 Accepted, not 201)
Use template_alias (string) not template_id when sending with a template
The from_address must use the apex domain (e.g. noreply@example.com), not the sending subdomain
Webhook signature header: X-Euromail-Signature: t={timestamp},v1={hex} — verify with HMAC-SHA256
Agent mailbox: get_next_mailbox_message() → process → ack_mailbox_message() with lease_token
Batch: send_batch() supports up to 500 emails per request
